desc.public: The resource is visible to everyone in Explore and on your public profile.
desc.private: Only you can see and use this resource. It does not appear in any public listing.
desc.production: Indicates this resource is in active use in a production environment.
desc.staging: Pre-production environment. The resource is ready for final validation before going to production.
desc.development: Resource under development or testing. Signals it may still change.
desc.test: Resource reserved for testing and validation.
desc.favorite: Marks the resource as a favorite for quick access.
desc.draft: Work in progress, not ready to use. Blocks access until it is complete.
desc.review: The resource needs review before being used or published.
desc.deprecated: Still works but is obsolete. A more recent alternative is recommended.
desc.quarantine: Blocks the resource. Cannot be used or start chats until the label is removed.
desc.archived: Blocks the resource. Indicates it is no longer active. Can be kept for reference.
desc.delete: Marks the resource for deletion. Blocks its use and allows bulk removal from the panel.

catalog.title: Label catalog
catalog.intro: Labels define the state and behavior of your resources. Every resource always has at least one visibility label.
